hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); EXIT_CODE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_output.exit_code // "0"'); if [ "$EXIT_CODE" != "0" ]; then STDERR=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_output.stderr // ""' | head -5 | tr '\n' ' '); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | head -1); echo "[Stolperstein] Command failed: $CMD — Consider querying Stolperstein for known pitfalls: query(text=\"$STDERR\")"; fi
